title: Charity Law Perspectives
content:
## Charity Law Perspectives
Strategic legal insight for Canada’s charitable and non-profit sector
Charity Law Perspectives offers timely insights into the legal, regulatory, and operational issues affecting Canada’s charitable and not-for-profit sector. Drawing on the deep experience of our nationally recognized Charities and Non-Profits Group, the blog explores topics such as tax-exempt structuring, CRA compliance for domestic and foreign-registered entities, governance, cross-border operations, and sector-specific developments. Whether you’re a foundation, charity, or advisor, this blog is your go-to resource for navigating the evolving legal landscape with clarity and confidence.
All form fields are required " * "
